arts.ttl: Gary Lineker pauses Match of the Day coverage to offer Michail Antonio car crash update
arts.sum: West Ham striker Michail Antonio was involved in a horror car crash in Essex on Saturday and Match of the Day host Gary Lineker made sure to pay tribute to him as he receives treatment in hospital

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker halts live Match of the Day show to send Michail Antonio message after car crash
arts.sum: BBC Match of the Day presenter Gary Lineker has sent a message to West Ham striker Michail Antonio, who was involved in a car crash on Saturday afternoon

arts.ttl: Michail Antonio's ex-wife rushes to hospital bedside after horror car crash
arts.sum: Debbie Whittle, the ex-wife of West Ham striker Michail Antonio, has been at his bedside after the forward was involved in a serious car crash on Saturday

arts.ttl: Redknapp shares Lopetegui, O'Neil sack verdicts ahead of West Ham v Wolves

arts.ttl: Steidten and board clash over possible next West Ham manager already – report

arts.ttl: “The best candidate” | Potential Julen Lopetegui replacement rejects West Ham
arts.sum: A high-profile manager has turned down the opportunity to join West Ham. Julen Lopetegui’s future at West Ham very much hangs in the balance. While it initially looked like he was going to get sacked after the Leicester game, he’s been given an opportunity to save his job with the home game against Wolves. However,... arts.sum: West Ham head coach Julen Lopetegui must beat his former club Wolves to keep his job on Monday night and he is full of praise for Molineux replacement Gary O'Neil
